torch_pattern:
input_tensor = input_tensor * scalar
if attention_mask is not None:
    input_tensor = input_tensor + attention_mask
output = torch.softmax(input_tensor, dim=-1)
applicability_notes: fusion_notes: Fuses pre-softmax scaling (e.g. 1/sqrt(head_dim)) and additive attention-mask application into a single softmax kernel. scale and mask are both optional: scale=None skips the multiply, mask=None skips the add, degenerating to plain softmax(dim=-1). Softmax dim must be the last dim. numeric_stable=True enables max-subtraction stabilization.; constraints: {'softmax_dim': -1, 'input_layout': 'TILE_LAYOUT', 'mask_dtypes_observed': ['bfloat16', 'float32'], 'mask_must_be_broadcastable_to_input': True}

placement_observations.source: unit_test: ttnn.from_torch(torch_a, layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, device=device) default interleaved DRAM
unit_test: tt_mask_l1 = ttnn.from_torch(..., memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG); both DRAM and L1 mask placements accepted (each compiles a separate program cache entry)
